name: extract_text
description: Extract plain text from a PDF file using pdfium engine

name: extract_structured
description: Extract structured data (per-page text + bbox) from PDF

name: get_page_count
description: Get the number of pages in a PDF file

name: search_keywords
description: Search for keywords in a PDF file and return matches with page numbers and context

name: extrude_to_server_wiki
description: Extract PDF to server-side wiki raw/ (Karpathy paradigm)

name: extrude_to_agent_payload
description: Extract PDF and return markdown payload with compilation instructions for AI Agent

name: init_knowledge_base
description: Initialize a new knowledge base from Karpathy-style templates (schema, index, log)

name: lint_wiki
description: Karpathy lint: orphans, broken links, contradictions, drift, missing concepts

name: archive_answer
description: Write a query answer back to the wiki as an overview page

name: compile_to_wiki
description: Compile a PDF into the knowledge base (Karpathy compiler pattern)

name: incremental_compile
description: Scan raw/ for changed PDFs and compile only those that need it

name: micro_compile
description: On-demand PDF extraction for conversation context (not saved to wiki)

name: aggregate_entries
description: Identify clusters of related L1 entries for L2 synthesis

name: hypothesis_test
description: Find contradicting entry pairs and generate debate framework

name: recompile_entry
description: Recompile a single wiki entry with version bump

name: save_wiki_entry
description: Create or update a wiki entry (YAML front matter required)

name: complete_compile_job
description: Finish a compile job: rebuild indexes and run quality gate

name: generate_compile_plan
description: Generate compile_plan.json with L1/L2/L3 tasks

name: get_compile_plan
description: Read the current compile plan and task statuses

name: mark_plan_task_done
description: Mark a compile plan task as done

name: compile_uploaded_pdf
description: Compile an uploaded PDF by file_id from POST /api/upload

name: search_knowledge
description: Search wiki entries (hybrid Tantivy + TF-IDF RRF)

name: rebuild_index
description: Rebuild Tantivy, petgraph, and TF-IDF indexes from wiki Markdown

name: get_entry_context
description: Get N-hop neighbors of a knowledge entry

name: get_agent_context
description: Token-efficient context bundle: center body, neighbors, related snippets

name: preview_wiki_patch
description: Preview a structured patch (unified diff, no write)

name: patch_wiki_entry
description: Apply structured patch and reindex entry

name: apply_wiki_patch
description: Alias for patch_wiki_entry — apply structured patch and reindex

name: find_orphans
description: Find entries with no related/contradiction links

name: suggest_links
description: Suggest links based on tag similarity (Jaccard)

name: export_concept_map
description: Export local concept map as Mermaid.js text

name: check_quality
description: Analyze wiki quality and return report with next actions

name: get_compilation_context
description: Compile-job context for awaiting_agent: stages, artifacts, prompts

name: get_config
description: Get runtime configuration for a knowledge base

name: set_config
description: Set a runtime configuration value (atomic write)

name: get_health_report
description: Comprehensive KB health: entries, graph, index, quality, extraction stack

name: trigger_incremental_compile
description: Manually trigger incremental compilation

name: get_compile_status
description: Compile status with stages and quality snapshot

name: list_quality_issues
description: List quality issues with stable issue_id

name: fix_suggest
description: Suggest MCP actions to fix a quality issue

name: apply_quality_gate
description: Run publish quality gate on all wiki entries

name: show_wiki_browser
description: Open interactive wiki browser MCP App resource

name: list_workspaces
description: List registered knowledge base workspaces

name: set_active_workspace
description: Set the active workspace by kb_id

name: register_workspace
description: Register or update a knowledge base workspace

name: list_extraction_plugins
description: List extraction backends in the current router

name: probe_extraction
description: Probe which extraction backend would be selected for a PDF

name: sync_status
description: Compare local KB manifest with remote sync store

name: sync_push
description: Push local KB objects to remote sync store

name: sync_pull
description: Pull KB objects from remote sync store

name: submit_patch_proposal
description: Submit wiki patch proposal without applying

name: apply_patch_proposal
description: Apply a pending patch proposal by id

name: list_patch_proposals
description: List pending or filtered patch proposals for a knowledge base
